## MACOM and Marvell Technology shares trade higher; no catalyst specified

No actionable fundamental signal; useful only as a price-action flag for MRVL longs monitoring technical momentum.

- Both MACOM and Marvell Technology stocks moved upward, per the headline.
- The Globe and Mail headline provides no specific catalyst, earnings event, or news driver.
- Classifier confidence is low; the story carries no discernible thematic signal beyond price action.
- Co-movement of MACOM and MRVL could reflect sector-level bid in optical/networking semis, but that is not stated explicitly.
